name: FIRST ALLOCATION
description: Learn the basics of memory management.
story:
SYSTEM BOOT... Memory sectors online.
You are the Memory Warden.
A corrupted process has left orphaned blocks.
Learn to allocate and free memory to restore order.

solution.explain: Allocate 256 bytes. Block #0 created.
Free block #0. Memory returned.
Allocate first block: 128 bytes.
Allocate second block: 64 bytes.
Allocate third block: 512 bytes. Level complete!

name: DEFRAGMENTATION
description: Merge fragmented free blocks into contiguous space.
story:
WARNING: Memory fragmentation detected.
The system is running slow.
Multiple free blocks are scattered between used blocks.
Merge them to recover contiguous memory.

solution.explain: Check state: three free blocks in a row (256+512+256).
Merge adjacent free blocks: 256+512+256 = 1024 bytes!
Allocate 1024 from merged block. Level complete!

hints: After defrag, a large contiguous space appears

name: MEMORY LEAKS
description: Scan for and eliminate memory leaks.
story:
CRITICAL: Memory leaks detected in sector 7.
Zombie blocks are consuming resources.
Scan the memory, find the leaks, and destroy them.

solution.explain: Scan memory -- 3 leaks detected!
Leaks marked as LEAK: blocks #1, #3, #4.
Free leaked block #1 (128 bytes).
Free leaked block #3 (512 bytes).
Free leaked block #4 (128 bytes). Level complete!

hints: Leaked blocks show LEAK in 'blocks' output

name: SORT & OPTIMIZE
description: Sort blocks by size to optimize allocation.
story:
PERFORMANCE ALERT: Memory blocks are disorganized.
Sort them by size to optimize the buddy allocator.
This will group free blocks for defragmentation.

solution.explain: Sort blocks by size. Free blocks group together.
Merge adjacent free: 256+512+1024 = 1792 bytes!
Allocate 1024 from the large block. Level complete!

hints: Then defrag to merge adjacent free blocks

name: FULL RECOVERY
description: Combine all skills to fully restore memory integrity.
story:
FINAL SECTOR: System integrity critical.
Fragmentation, leaks, and disorder everywhere.
Use everything you have learned to restore this sector.
Sort, defrag, scan, and allocate with precision.

solution.explain: Scan -- 2 leaks found in blocks #0 and #4.
Free leaked block #0 (512 bytes).
Free leaked block #4 (64 bytes). All leaks cleared.
Sort by size. Free blocks (64+128+128+256+256+512) group together.
Merge: 64+128+128+256+256+512 = 1344 bytes contiguous.
Wait -- 1344 < 2048! We need more space. Free block #6 (1024) first.
Free the 1024-byte block. Now we have 1344+1024 = 2368 free.
Defrag again: merge all free into 2368 bytes.
Allocate 2048 from 2368. Level complete! System restored!

hints: You may need to free additional blocks to fit 2048
